metadata.description: Autonomous visual iteration loop for frontend UI/UX polish

plugins.name: design-loop
plugins.description: Autonomous visual iteration loop for frontend UI/UX with 3 operational modes: Precision Polish (surgical CSS fixes), Theme-Respect Elevate (design-system-aware), and Creative Unleash (bold redesign). Takes section-level screenshots, scores against 5 anti-slop criteria, fixes issues, and repeats until polished.
